ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturing_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the site */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site manager */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturing_sites_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" INTEGER /* Type of the product (e.g., electronics, textiles) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the product is manufactured */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product */,
  "quality_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality standard for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type FOREIGN KEY ("product_type") REFERENCES product_types ("product_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_quality_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_standard_id") REFERENCES quality_control_measures ("quality_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES manufacturing_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being manufactured */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of production */,
  "num_products" REAL /* Number of products manufactured */,
  "defective_products" REAL /* Number of defective products */,
  "quality_test_passed" REAL /* Number of products that passed quality tests */,
  "cost" REAL /* Manufacturing cost */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Exact date of production */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the production data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product type */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control_measures" (
  "quality_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality control measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality control measure */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the measure */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_measures_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., production manager, quality control specialist) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was revoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpi_data" (
  "kpi_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI data point */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard */,
  "kpi_name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI */,
  "kpi_value" REAL /* Value of the KPI */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the KPI was measured */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the KPI data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_data_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)
